list.vod_blurb: World War II is around the corner, but the only thing Sally Bauer can think of is the ocean. Her dre
list.vod_content: World War II is around the corner, but the only thing Sally Bauer can think of is the ocean. Her dream is to swim across the English Channel. Her father has tried to exorcise her obsession with swimming since she was a toddler, without success. An unwanted pregnancy forces her to abandon her dream â€“ and herself. The childâ€™s father does not want to be involved, so as a woman in ...
